title: Mervyn’s
subtitle: Campaign & Photography
description: A campaign and photography project focused on crafting a bold visual narrative for Mervyn’s.
body: We collaborated with the client to define a visual language aligned with their brand story.
The campaign assets were designed for multi-channel usage including social, web, and print.

title: Narasha
subtitle: Website Ecommerce & Photography
description: An e‑commerce and photography engagement creating a seamless buying experience supported by strong visuals.
body: We designed and developed an experience optimized for conversion and brand storytelling.
Photography was art-directed to highlight both product details and lifestyle usage.

title: Butter me up
subtitle: Photography
description: A photography-focused project capturing the playful and appetizing character of the brand.
body: We developed a visual system that makes the product feel tactile and craveable.
Lighting and composition were tuned to highlight textures and colors.

title: Snoop’s Joint
subtitle: Campaign & Photography
description: A campaign and photography project building a vivid, character-driven world for Snoop’s Joint.
body: We created a campaign system that works across outdoor, digital, and in‑store touchpoints.
Photography pushed a cinematic, atmospheric direction while remaining product-focused.

title: MC Foods
subtitle: Campaign & Photography
description: A campaign and photography initiative highlighting MC Foods’ range through bold, appetizing imagery.
body: We created key visuals and supporting assets for both retail and digital campaigns.
The photography direction focused on freshness, color, and clarity of product presentation.

title: Flora Capital
subtitle: Magzine Design
description: Magazine design for Flora Capital, balancing editorial readability with a strong visual identity.
body: We structured content layouts to support both quick scanning and deep reading.
Typography, grids, and imagery were tuned to convey trust, clarity, and modernity.

title: Smarttek
subtitle: Website & Brand
description: A digital and brand project for Smarttek, focused on a sharp and modern online presence.
body: We designed and built a responsive website to showcase Smarttek’s offerings.
Brand elements were refined to feel both technical and approachable.
